page: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v6 is an Eadv6-series virtual machine configured with 48 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 AMD processor architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 14.0 GB per vCPU.

The instance includes 5669 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk configurations. There are no integrated graphics processing units on this server type, meaning all workloads rely entirely on the dedicated AMD CPU cores.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density relative to the CPU core count positions this instance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The combination of substantial local storage and large memory capacity makes this server type suitable for large relational databases, in-memory caching layers, and data analytics pipelines that require significant RAM but do not demand GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure E96-48ads_v6 is an Eadv6-series virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs built on x86_64 AMD processor architecture and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This memory-optimized instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of RAM, providing a high allocation of 14.0 GB per core. It includes 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks GPU acceleration. The high memory-to-CPU ratio and substantial local storage capacity make this server type highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics pipelines.
